name: Dashan Education Holdings Limited
summary: Dashan Education Holdings Limited provides primary and secondary after-school education services in Zhengzhou, China. The company offers online merge offline after-school education services, which supplement primary and secondary school students regular English, Chinese, mathematics, and other curriculum at school. As of December 31, 2020, it operates 99 self-operated teaching centers; and 9 franchisees. The company also sells books and teaching materials; and offers brand name licensing and advisory services. Dashan Education Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Zhengzhou, China. Dashan Education Holdings Limited operates as a subsidiary of Lucky Heaven International Limited.
